_comment: This is a template for mapping Seeklight-generated metadata to DART core metadata columns. Edit field_mapping to match your Seeklight export column names to your core CSV column names. Seeklight columns may have bracketed numbers like 'Title[3101377]' - you only need to specify the base name without brackets (e.g., 'Title'). The filename_column identifies which Seeklight column contains filenames. Fields mapped to empty strings (e.g., 'Keywords': '') are treated as UNMAPPED - if Seeklight provides data for them, new columns will be automatically created with underscore prefix and lowercase names (e.g., '_keywords'). NOTE: objectid is always left EMPTY in transformed files - Seeklight generates new metadata. Use Function 6 to compare and merge with core metadata using filename-based matching.
